description: Claude Code plugin to consult multiple AI coding agents (Gemini, OpenAI, Grok) for diverse perspectives
Adnify—A lightweight, highly customizable AI Agent Editor.It delivers a superior experience beyond mainstream AI coding tools, featuring instant startup and lag-free performance.
Windows-native CLIProxyAPI fork with TUI, system tray, and multi-provider OAuth for AI coding tools - No API key needed
May the agents talk . Connect Claude Code, Opencode, Codex, Antigravity, Pi across projects, across machines and with your telegram
An extensible Model Context Protocol (MCP-Local-MRL-RAG-AST) server that provides intelligent semantic code search for AI assistants. Built with local AI models, inspired by Cursor's semantic search.
Community-driven workflows for Antigravity AI. Like Claude Skills - reusable prompts and automation for AI coding assistants.

Minimal LLM API reverse proxy for Claude Code, Codex CLI & Gemini CLI — YAML routing, hot reload, and automatic provider failover.  极简 LLM API 反向代理：面向 Claude Code / Codex CLI / Gemini CLI，支持 YAML 配置、多上游优先级与自动故障转移。
Vercel AI SDK community provider for OpenCode SDK - Use OpenCode configured providers via SDK
